title: New York State Route 255

infobox.value: [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") in [Sparta](/wiki/Sparta,_New_York "Sparta, New York")
[NY 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15") in [Conesus](/wiki/Conesus,_New_York "Conesus, New York")

* [Interstate](/wiki/List_of_Interstate_Highways_in_New_York "List of Interstate Highways in New York") * [US](/wiki/List_of_U.S._Routes_in_New_York "List of U.S. Routes in New York") * [State](/wiki/List_of_state_routes_in_New_York "List of state routes in New York") * [Reference](/wiki/List_of_reference_routes_in_New_York "List of reference routes in New York") * [Parkways](/wiki/Parkways_in_New_York "Parkways in New York") | |

(**NY 255**) was a 5.8-mile-long (9.3 km) [state highway](/wiki/State_highway "State highway") located in [Livingston County, New York](/wiki/Livingston_County,_New_York "Livingston County, New York"), in the United States. The southern terminus of the route was at an intersection with [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") south of the community of Scottsburg in [Sparta](/wiki/Sparta,_New_York "Sparta, New York"). Its northern terminus was at a junction with [NY 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15") in [Conesus](/wiki/Conesus,_New_York "Conesus, New York"). NY 255, known locally as Stagecoach Road, was assigned in 1930 and maintained by Livingston County from 1983 onward as **County Route 71** (CR 71). The concurrent state highway designation was removed in 1995.

*New York* (Map). [Rand McNally and Company](/wiki/Rand_McNally_and_Company "Rand McNally and Company"). 1995. [ISBN](/wiki/ISBN_(identifier) "ISBN (identifier)") [0-528-96764-9](/wiki/Special:BookSources/0-528-96764-9 "Special:BookSources/0-528-96764-9").

*Official Map Showing State Highways and other important roads* (Map). Cartography by Rand McNally and Company. [State of New York Department of Public Works](/wiki/State_of_New_York_Department_of_Public_Works "State of New York Department of Public Works"). 1926.

["Highway Route Changes Made in This Area"](http://fultonhistory.com/highlighter/viewer/?file=http%3A%2F%2Ffultonhistory.com%2FNewspaper%252011%2FDansville%2520NY%2520Breeze%2FDansville%2520NY%2520Breeze%25201940%2520Grayscale%2FDansville%2520NY%2520Breeze%25201940%2520Grayscale%2520-%25201039.pdf&highlightsFile=http%3A%2F%2Ffultonhistory.com%2Fhighlighter%2Fhits%2F050a285a79e087c883c1616f1d2bf6b6#page=1). *Dansville Breeze*. December 11, 1940. p. 1. Retrieved February 3, 2026.

[New York State Legislature](/wiki/New_York_State_Legislature "New York State Legislature"). ["New York State Highway Law § 341"](http://public.leginfo.state.ny.us/LAWSSEAF.cgi?QUERYTYPE=LAWS+&QUERYDATA=$$HAY341$$@TXHAY0341+&LIST=LAW+&TARGET=VIEW). Retrieved December 3, 2010.
[*Conesus Digital Raster Quadrangle*](http://gis.ny.gov/gisdata/quads/drg24/dotpreview/index.cfm?code=s17) (Map). 1:24,000. New York State Department of Transportation. 1984. Retrieved May 10, 2010.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Former state highway in New York State

| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | ←  [NY 254](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_254 "New York State Route 254") |  | →  [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") | | |

**New York State Route 255** (**NY 255**) was a 5.8-mile-long (9.3 km) [state highway](/wiki/State_highway "State highway") located in [Livingston County, New York](/wiki/Livingston_County,_New_York "Livingston County, New York"), in the United States. The southern terminus of the route was at an intersection with [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") south of the community of Scottsburg in [Sparta](/wiki/Sparta,_New_York "Sparta, New York"). Its northern terminus was at a junction with [NY 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15") in [Conesus](/wiki/Conesus,_New_York "Conesus, New York"). NY 255, known locally as Stagecoach Road, was assigned in 1930 and maintained by Livingston County from 1983 onward as **County Route 71** (CR 71). The concurrent state highway designation was removed in 1995.

## Route description

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=New_York_State_Route_255&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Route description")]

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/04/Livingston_CR_71_from_NY_256.jpg/250px-Livingston_CR_71_from_NY_256.jpg)](/wiki/File:Livingston_CR_71_from_NY_256.jpg)

Livingston CR 71 from NY 256 in Sparta, the former southern terminus of NY 255

NY 255 began at an intersection with [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") southeast of the [hamlet](/wiki/Hamlet_(New_York) "Hamlet (New York)") of Scottsburg and north of the village of [Dansville](/wiki/Dansville,_Livingston_County,_New_York "Dansville, Livingston County, New York") in the town of [Sparta](/wiki/Sparta,_New_York "Sparta, New York"). While NY 256 headed northwest into a valley surrounding the [Conesus Inlet](/w/index.php?title=Conesus_Inlet&action=edit&redlink=1 "Conesus Inlet (page does not exist)"), NY 255 headed northward as Stagecoach Road, running across mostly undeveloped areas along the top of the valley. East of Scottsburg, NY 255 intersected [CR 1A](/wiki/County_Route_1A_(Livingston_County,_New_York) "County Route 1A (Livingston County, New York)") (Springwater Road) and [CR 38](/wiki/County_Route_38_(Livingston_County,_New_York) "County Route 38 (Livingston County, New York)") (Liberty Pole Road), the former connecting to Scottsburg, before crossing into [Conesus](/wiki/Conesus,_New_York "Conesus, New York"). Within Conesus, NY 255 continued along the upper edge of the valley to the hamlet of Conesus, located near the southeastern tip of [Conesus Lake](/wiki/Conesus_Lake "Conesus Lake"), where it terminated at a junction with [NY 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15").[[1]](#cite_note-GM-1)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=New_York_State_Route_255&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: History")]

The north–south highway connecting [Dansville](/wiki/Dansville,_Livingston_County,_New_York "Dansville, Livingston County, New York") to [Conesus](/wiki/Conesus,_New_York "Conesus, New York") was taken over by the state of New York by 1926.[[5]](#cite_note-5) In the [1930 renumbering of state highways in New York](/wiki/1930_state_highway_renumbering_(New_York) "1930 state highway renumbering (New York)"), NY 255 was assigned to the entirety of the highway, extending from [NY 36](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_36 "New York State Route 36") and [NY 39](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_39 "New York State Route 39") (now [NY 63](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_63 "New York State Route 63")) in Dansville and [NY 2](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_2_(1927%E2%80%931939) "New York State Route 2 (1927–1939)") (now [NY 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15")) in Conesus.[[2]](#cite_note-gb-2) NY 255 was truncated to [Sparta](/wiki/Sparta,_New_York "Sparta, New York") in December 1940 and replaced with an extended [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") between Dansville and Scottsburg.[[6]](#cite_note-ny36acanned-6) On April 1, 1983, ownership and maintenance of NY 255 was transferred from the state of New York to [Livingston County](/wiki/Livingston_County,_New_York "Livingston County, New York") as part of a highway maintenance swap between the two levels of government.[[7]](#cite_note-7) Although the road was now maintained by Livingston County as CR 71, the road initially remained signed as NY 255 as well.[[8]](#cite_note-conesus_quad-8) The NY 255 designation was finally removed from the road on October 25, 1995.[[3]](#cite_note-2009log-3)

## Major intersections

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=New_York_State_Route_255&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Major intersections")]

The entire route was in [Livingston County](/wiki/Livingston_County,_New_York "Livingston County, New York").

| Location | mi[[1]](#cite_note-GM-1) | km | Destinations | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| [Sparta](/wiki/Sparta,_New_York "Sparta, New York") | 0.0 | 0.0 | [NY 256](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_256 "New York State Route 256") (West Swamp Road) |  |
| [Conesus](/wiki/Conesus,_New_York "Conesus, New York") | 5.8 | 9.3 | [NY 15](/wiki/New_York_State_Route_15 "New York State Route 15") (Conesus–Springwater Road) |  |
| 1.000 mi = 1.609 km; 1.000 km = 0.621 mi | | | | | |
